articles.title: Near Protocol partners with Google Cloud to support Web3 devs
articles.description: Under a partnership with Near Protocol, Google Cloud will support Near developers in building and scaling their Web3 projects and DApps.

articles.title: Terra LUNA Do Kwon Lashes out at Fake Reports About Frozen Funds
articles.description: Korean prosecutors have reportedly frozen $40 million of funds Kwon had attempted to conceal on crypto exchanges KuCoin and OKX.

articles.title: Solana Spikes 4% After Recent Recurring Glitches – A Little Shine For SOL?
articles.description: There has been some criticism about Solana since it was established in March of 2020. Through a thread he created, Cyber Capital founder Justin Bons exposed the network’s recent “anomalies.” and how it violated decentralization in the sense of DeFi. articles.title: Nexo co-founders address recent cease and desist orders from US state regulators
articles.description: Nexo co-founders Antoni Trenchev and Kalin Metodiev hosted an AMA on October 4 in which they addressed recent cease and desist orders issued by several U.S state regulators.

articles.title: Dogecoin Set For Gargantuan Gains As Elon Musk Moves To Proceed With $44B Twitter Purchase Agreement
articles.description: Memecoin Dogecoin experienced a marked bullish bump on Tuesday, bolstered by the announcement that Dogefather Elon Musk is reportedly still interested in buying Twitter on the deal’s original terms.

articles.title: What Crypto Winter? GMX Soars 34% on Binance Listing
articles.description: GMX went live on Binance earlier today. One of crypto winters outperformers is benefiting from the Binance listing effect.Per CoinGecko data, GMX has jumped to $54.20 in Wednesday trading, up 34.2% on the day. It briefly topped $60, falling a whisker short of its $62.10 all-time high recorded at the beginning of the year. While the fast-growing decentralized exchange has shown strength over...

articles.title: Acala restores full operations after users ‘error minted’ 3 billion aUSD
articles.description: Polkadot’s DeFi-focused parachain Acala has reopened its services to users, three weeks after a major security incident.

articles.title: SEC opposes motions from two firms seeking to back Ripple in XRP lawsuit
articles.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has objected to motions from two firms that had requested to file amicus briefs in support of Ripple Labs Inc., in the lawsuit that the SEC filed in 2020 against Ripple. See related article: Two firms seek to weigh in on XRP lawsuit between SEC, Ripple Fast facts […]

articles.description: Elon Musk's renewed interest in Twitter resulted in a 8.2% price spike for Dogecoin (DOGE).
